content:
1. Federal Contracts (SAM.gov API) - Enhanced
    • Government contract awards (revenue signals)
    • Endpoint: https://api.sam.gov/entity-information/v3/entities
    • Cost: Free API, but premium parsing/monitoring

  1. News & Sentiment (AlphaVantage, NewsAPI, Factiva)
    • Real-time news monitoring
    • AI-powered sentiment analysis
    • Cost: $50-500/month depending on volume

Implementation:
// src/lib/data-sources/professional-tier.ts
export class ProfessionalTierDataSource extends StarterTierDataSource {
async getComprehensiveCredit(companyName: string) {
const experian = await this.experianAPI.getCreditReport(companyName);
return {
creditScore: experian.businessCreditScore,
bankruptcyRisk: experian.bankruptcyModel,
paymentIndex: experian.intelliscore,
